headline: Trump Mobile will take your $499 right now
summary: The T1 Phone from Trump Mobile is now openly available for direct purchase. No deposit is required to buy the phone directly. This follows a previous limited release to pre-order customers.

headline: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
summary: Amazon's Prime Day is featuring the best Apple product deals seen so far this year. The Apple Watch Series 11 has dropped to a new low price. AirPods Pro 3 are currently discounted to $179.

headline: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
summary: Android 17 is introducing a dedicated gaming mode for foldable phones. It places a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half the screen. This feature aims to make playing games on foldables easier by emulating physical button presses.

headline: YouTube updates Shorts to make it even more like TikTok
summary: YouTube is adding more TikTok-like features to its Shorts platform. A new 'clear screen' mode removes icons and text from videos. The 'thumbs-up' button will be replaced by a 'heart' icon.

headline: PlayStation Boss Says New Console Experiences Will Involve 'Leveraging Technologies That Can Be Used in Various Forms and Locations' — and I'm Convinced He's Teasing a PS6 Handheld
summary: Sony CEO Hideaki Nishino hinted at future hybrid, Switch-like PlayStation consoles. He spoke of leveraging technologies for various forms and locations. This is widely interpreted as a tease for a PS6 handheld device.

headline: The 35 Best Gaming Deals in the Prime Day Sales — Hand-Picked by Our Deals Experts
summary: The 2026 Prime Day sales offer a surprisingly healthy amount of video game deals. Discounts are available for PS5, Switch, and Xbox owners. Deals experts have hand-picked the 35 best offers.

headline: True Scale of Bungie Layoffs Revealed, With Nearly 300 Cut From Its Bellevue, Washington Headquarters Alone
summary: Nearly 300 staff members were cut in Bungie's recent layoffs. The layoffs primarily affected employees at the Bellevue, Washington headquarters. Official records have revealed the true scale of the job reductions.

headline: Cape Fear Episode 5 Recap and Review – 'Faith'
summary: The review for 'Cape Fear Episode 5: Faith' notes a mid-season slump. Despite stellar acting, the episode reportedly stalls out. It concludes with a wild, jaw-dropping ending.

headline: New bodycam footage shows Henry Nowak killer's arrest and repeated lies to police
summary: New bodycam video shows the arrest of Henry Nowak's killer. The footage, released after a BBC request, reveals the killer repeatedly lied to police. The arrest and falsehoods are now public.

headline: King becomes first monarch to reveal tax bill as royal public funding to double to £100m
summary: The King has become the first monarch to publicly reveal his tax bill. He paid £12.9m in tax last year. Royal public funding is set to double to £100m.

headline: King and Queen will not live in Buckingham Palace after renovations
summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will not move into Buckingham Palace after its renovations. They will continue to reside at Clarence House. Buckingham Palace confirmed their decision to remain in their current home.

headline: Watch: Driver gives lift to armed officer chasing suspect
summary: A driver in Margate pulled over to give an armed officer a lift during a suspect chase. The entire pursuit and assistance were caught on camera. The motorist's quick action aided the officer.
